remarks: A rare opportunity to own a beautiful 1-acre property on the sought-after west side of town in one of New Canaan's most desirable neighborhoods. The existing residence offers renovation potential, while the exceptional lot provides the ideal setting to build a custom home. Enjoy the perfect balance of privacy and convenience with easy access to downtown New Canaan, the Merritt Parkway, shopping, dining, parks, and top-rated schools. Please do not walk the property without a confirmed appointment.
